economic_notes: Société de Développement d'Odanak inc. is a wholly-owned government business enterprise accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated - subject of qualified audit opinion). Net loss from GBE: $938,091. Rented buildings generating $439,443 revenue. Economic development projects including Tolba hiking trail and industrial park infrastructure.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because Société de Développement d'Odanak inc. (wholly-owned corporation) was not consolidated - it was accounted for by modified equity method instead of being treated as a government unit per PSAS. The effect of non-consolidation has not been quantified. Net loss from this GBE was $938,091. The revenue breakdown is derived from departmental segment schedules as no single revenue line summary is provided. OSR cannot be determined from summary statements as all revenue appears to be government-funded; rented buildings ($439,443) and other own-source items may exist within departmental totals but cannot be separated. Restricted cash includes replacement reserve $298,621, operating reserve $249,911, and trust fund liquidity $2,979,881. The prior year summary financials were audited by a different firm. Significant specific claims legal proceedings ongoing (TRP-2003-11 and TRP-2001-11). Guarantees endorsed for community members totalling $3,536,098 and for Société Historique d'Odanak $643,254.
